## PartialResultsList class

It renders a list of partial results from [SearchState.partialResults](./x-components.searchstate.partialresults.md) by default. It also provides the partial result slot to customize the item with the partial result bound.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class PartialResultsList extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation](./x-components.partialresultslist.animation.md) |  | Vue \| string | Animation component that will be used to animate the partial results. |
|  [items](./x-components.partialresultslist.items.md) |  | PartialResult\[\] | The partials results from the search state. |
|  [maxItemsToRender](./x-components.partialresultslist.maxitemstorender.md) |  | number | Maximum number of partial results to show. |
